steps.title: Identify what 'most remarkably' signals
steps.content: The phrase “most remarkably” indicates the student was struck by the most dramatic, striking difference in the data. The answer must show a large disparity—not just any variation between systems.

steps.title: Find the maximum contrast in sales
steps.content: Game & Watch sold 18,600,000 units, far exceeding all competitors (clustered at 2–4 million). ColecoVision, at 2,000,000, is the lowest. This creates a 16.6-million-unit gap—by far the most extreme difference in the table. Choices A and C compare systems within the crowded 2–4 million range (differing by only 1 million), and choice B incorrectly attributes 18.6 million to MSX. This matches choice D — D is correct.
